response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:54: Identified as crowd shots at the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert. 2. 02:54-04:56: Identified performance of the song 'Bokura no Ina-dachi no Tsukurikata' by Ninomae Ina'nis. 3. Searched for official lyrics for 'Bokura no Ina-dachi no Tsukurikata', but no lyrics were found on public indexing sites, indicating it is an original song for the concert.
response.global_summary: Crowd footage from the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert followed by a vocal performance by Ninomae Ina'nis.

scenes.description: Crowd at the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert holding glowsticks in a dark venue.
Ninomae Ina'nis performs 'Bokura no Ina-dachi no Tsukurikata' on stage.
